chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-1745 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing: 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of Misc. No.8662/25 3. For hearing of main case. 05.08.2025. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, AAG alongwith I.O. Muhammad Urs, PS Qambar. ------------------------------ I.O. Muhammad Urs of PS Qambar City Sindh present in court states that he has already filed Challan under ‘C’ class before the concerned Judicial Magistrate. As such this matter has become infructuous as the concerned Judicial Magistrate shall pass the orders on the report submitted by the aforesaid I.O. Hence the instant petition is hereby dismissed having become infructuous alongwith pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
